description: From the darkness at my back, I raise my arcane focus and spit the syllables of Magic Missile under my breath — three crackling darts of force arcing through the dim cellar air straight at the goblin's chest. 'Put. The book. Down.' I keep my voice low and flat.
ooc_note: Using Magic Missile specifically because it auto-hits regardless of cover or my position in darkness, no attack roll to disadvantage. Spending one of my two 1st-level slots. If the goblin drops the grimoire before or after my turn, I'd like to interact with the object as a free action to grab it if within reach.
